FFlagAXUseStarIconForFavorites_Staged.mechanism: Changes the icon for favorite items to a star symbol.
FFlagAXUseStarIconForFavorites_Staged.purpose: Makes it easier for players to identify their favorite items at a glance.

FFlagVideoCaptureSelfTestReportError_Sta.mechanism: Implements error reporting for video capture self-tests.
FFlagVideoCaptureSelfTestReportError_Sta.purpose: Helps players troubleshoot issues with video capture features more effectively.

DFIntRbxStorageMinAvailableSpaceBeforeCl.mechanism: Sets a minimum amount of storage space required before cleanup occurs.
DFIntRbxStorageMinAvailableSpaceBeforeCl.purpose: Ensures players have enough space for their data before automatic cleanup happens.

FFlagAXUseStarIconForFavorites.mechanism: Updates the favorite items icon to a star for all users.
FFlagAXUseStarIconForFavorites.purpose: Enhances user experience by providing a clear visual for favorite items.

FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.mechanism: Stores a fast-access string representing the current version of the code.
FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.purpose: Improves performance and stability by ensuring players are using the latest features.

FFlagMenuButtonsMountWithIEM_Staged.mechanism: Updates the way menu buttons are positioned using a new interface model.
FFlagMenuButtonsMountWithIEM_Staged.purpose: Improves the layout and responsiveness of menu buttons for a better user experience.

FFlagAXFoundationRobuxIconMigration.mechanism: Changes the icon for Robux to a new design within the AX Foundation framework.
FFlagAXFoundationRobuxIconMigration.purpose: Enhances visual consistency and modernizes the appearance of the Robux icon.

DFFlagOptimizeUnrelatedSecurityTasks_Sta.mechanism: Streamlines security processes that are not directly related to user interactions.
DFFlagOptimizeUnrelatedSecurityTasks_Sta.purpose: Increases overall platform performance, leading to faster and smoother gameplay.

DFFlagEnableCapturesGalleryRetrieval2_St.mechanism: Implements a new method for retrieving user-generated captures from the gallery.
DFFlagEnableCapturesGalleryRetrieval2_St.purpose: Allows players to access and share their captures more easily and quickly.

FFlagPerformanceControlBudgetSystemRollo.mechanism: Introduces a new system for managing performance budgets in game development.
FFlagPerformanceControlBudgetSystemRollo.purpose: Helps developers optimize their games, resulting in better performance and reduced lag for players.

DFIntSQLiteBusyChkpointMaxReport.mechanism: Limits the number of busy checkpoint reports in SQLite to optimize database performance.
DFIntSQLiteBusyChkpointMaxReport.purpose: Improves game stability by reducing delays when accessing game data.

FFlagUserSearchGoBackOnCancel.mechanism: Allows users to return to the previous search results when they cancel a new search.
FFlagUserSearchGoBackOnCancel.purpose: Enhances user experience by making it easier to navigate search results.

FFlagAXFix2DClothingTryOn_Staged.mechanism: Fixes issues with trying on 2D clothing items in a staged environment.
FFlagAXFix2DClothingTryOn_Staged.purpose: Ensures that players can accurately preview clothing items before purchasing.
